project.name: Example Product Line Roadmap
project.snapshotNotes: Sample snapshot for the Product-Line Roadmap Decision Tool.

products.name: Product 1.0
products.description: Retired production product retained for lineage and reference.

products.name: Product 2.0
products.description: Active production product for current roadmap decisions.

products.name: Product 2.5
products.description: Active intermediate product with selected capability upgrades.

capabilities.name: Secure Remote Update
capabilities.description: Support secure remote software update workflow.

capabilities.name: Input Power Envelope
capabilities.description: Supported platform input power constraint, such as 28VDC or 40VDC operation.

capabilities.name: RX Band Coverage
capabilities.description: Receive supported mission bands within the required sensitivity and selectivity envelope.

capabilityClaims.notes: Verified in lab with configuration caveats.

capabilityClaims.bdCaveat: Requires antenna and RF front-end impact review.

evidence.title: Secure Remote Update Lab Demo
evidence.summary: Lab demonstration of baseline remote update workflow.

gaps.title: Remote Update Verification Gap
gaps.description: Current baseline has only limited verification for a manual update workflow; target requires verified remote update support.

gaps.title: RX Band Expansion Design Gap
gaps.description: Target product needs expanded RX band support; current RF chain is not assessed for that band.
gaps.technicalImpact: antenna, RF front end, filtering, calibration.

roadmapCandidates.name: Secure Update Enablement
roadmapCandidates.description: Enable secure remote update workflow for planned products.
roadmapCandidates.assumptions: Assumes existing controller has sufficient memory and security hooks.

roadmapCandidates.name: RX Band Expansion
roadmapCandidates.description: Expand receive band support for planned products.
roadmapCandidates.scheduleDrivers: Antenna supplier lead time and RF test chamber availability
roadmapCandidates.assumptions: Assumes enclosure aperture and front-end noise figure can support the new band.

designElements.name: Antenna Assembly
designElements.description: Antenna aperture, matching network, mounting, and band-dependent performance.

designElements.name: RF Front End
designElements.description: Low-noise amplifier, filtering, switching, and receive chain components.

capabilityDesignLinks.rationale: RX band changes may require antenna tuning, aperture, or matching changes.
RX band changes can affect filtering, LNA selection, switching, and calibration.
Secure update workflows depend on controller memory, boot flow, and security hooks.

impactAssessments.scheduleDriver: Antenna supplier quote and chamber time
impactAssessments.verificationConsequence: Antenna pattern and sensitivity verification required.
impactAssessments.riskConsequence: May require enclosure or aperture change.
impactAssessments.basis: Suggested by RX band to antenna link.
